commit.message:
fix(ml): compute real num_indicators_agreeing and bullish/bearish weights

Two more always-constant ML features fixed:

1. num_indicators_agreeing was hardcoded to 3 → constant, zero correlation.
   Now counts actual indicator agreement: EMA crossover, MACD histogram,
   Heikin Ashi trend, RSI in 50-70 range. Returns 2-4 (how many agree
   on the dominant direction). Varies each tick → real signal.

2. bullish_weight / bearish_weight only checked MACD → binary 0/1.
   Now aggregates EMA(1.0) + MACD(0.5) + HA(0.5) + RSI(0.3) weighted
   sum, normalized to [0,1]. Captures nuanced partial alignment.

Combined with polymarket_price patch (25942ed), volatility_history fix
(57902cd), and purge_old_samples — 4 previously-constant features now
carry genuine signal per tick.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Bug #74: UnboundLocalError on risk_config blocks ALL trades

Per-trader risk_config override (Bug #64 Phase 2, commit 924e7fc) assigned
risk_config = _rc at line 2697, making Python treat risk_config as local
for the entire do_trade_for_account() function. Fallback reads at lines
2656/2663/2676 accessed risk_config BEFORE that assignment → UnboundLocalError
on every single trade. Same pattern as Bug #50 (datetime shadowing).

Fix: save outer scope to _outer_risk_config before the override block.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Track ALL Spotify API calls — scheduler + API combined in /spotify/stats

Scheduler calls (current_playback, pause, resume) now counted.
Stats endpoint shows api/scheduler/total breakdown.

commit.message:
fix(ml): purge old samples before training + fix zero-variance features

Three ML quality improvements:

1. Dataset.purge_old_samples(): remove observations older than
   walk_forward_train_days (30d) before each training run. Prevents
   the model from fitting stale market conditions (old price regimes,
   different volatility environments).

2. volatility_history never received push() calls — was always empty
   → volatility_percentile was constant 0.5 (zero correlation with target).
   Same bug in spread_history → spread_percentile always 0.5.
   Fixed by populating both histories on each feature computation tick.

3. min_samples_for_training 20→50 — 20 samples with 58 features gives
   only 0.3 samples/feature (extreme overfitting). 50 is a safer floor.

Combined with the polymarket_price fix (commit 25942ed), these changes
ensure the top 3 previously-constant features now carry real signal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix internals chart readability with high-contrast color palette (#984)

## Summary
- The internals charts are barely readable after the redesign (#980)
because chart text (legend labels, axis ticks, axis titles, tooltip
body) all use `--text-muted` (#6b6b78) — a dark grey meant for
de-emphasized UI hints, not chart data on a `#17171c` background. Grid
lines use `--border-subtle` which is nearly invisible.
- Upgrade all chart text to `--text-secondary` (#9e9eab) and grid lines
to `rgba(255,255,255,0.1)` for both the trends and blunder analysis
charts.
- Also replace the LINE_COLORS palette: the old one used 10 Tailwind
hues each repeated at 3 progressively lighter/pastelier levels, making
many of the 30+ model lines indistinguishable. New palette uses 30
high-saturation, hue-diverse colors.

## Test plan
- [x] `make check` passes
- [x] Visually verified the internals page at
`/internals/?metric=reasoningPct&minEpoch=1&smoothing=1` — legend text,
axis labels, grid lines, and model line colors are all clearly readable

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: Semaphore 跨事件循环绑定错误 — 检测 loop 变化时自动重建

asyncio.run() 每次创建新事件循环，但 AiClient 缓存的 Semaphore
仍绑定在旧循环上，导致 "is bound to a different event loop" 错误。
现在 _get_semaphore() 会检测当前 loop 是否与缓存一致，不一致时重建。

commit.message:
Smart Spotify polling — sleep through song, rapid-poll last 15s

Instead of polling every 15s (240 calls/hr), now:
- 1 call to get track + remaining time
- Sleep until 15s before end
- Rapid-poll every 3s to catch exact change
Total: ~6 calls per song, ~30/hr

companion(ch1+ch2): fix Rawlsian invocation + succession staleness

Ch1 v1.1.0: Replace difference-principle / worst-off-party framing with
Scanlonian reasonable-rejection principle. The chapter explicitly brackets
phenomenal consciousness; Rawls' veil of ignorance requires parties to care
which position they occupy (phenomenal valence), making it inconsistent with
the structural anchor. Scanlon grounds obligations in articulable functional
interests without resolving the phenomenal question — the correct framework
for this chapter.

Ch2 v1.1.0: Update succession section. Replace "genuine gap, not a solved
problem" with forward reference to Ch4's three-layer resolution (Nussbaum
entitlement floor + Scanlonian normative uptake + Parfitian diagnostic
structure). Reframe Parfit as diagnostic (identifies why formal succession
fails) not constructive (mechanism). Obligation-generation mechanism is
Scanlonian: genuine engagement with governance history constitutes entering
a normative arrangement that couldn't be reasonably rejected.

Both fixes from Bishop adversarial scan, 2026-03-10.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(blog): use APP_URL for upload image URLs, not tenant frontend domain

Blog post featured images and author avatars were constructed using
UrlHelper::getBaseUrl() which returns the tenant's frontend URL
(e.g. https://hour-timebank.ie). The React nginx container serving
that domain has no /uploads/ directory — uploads live exclusively
on the PHP container.

The Cloudflare cache purge during today's full deploy exposed this
because previously Cloudflare had been serving cached copies of the
images. After the purge, origin requests to hour-timebank.ie/uploads/
returned 404.

Fix: always use APP_URL (api.project-nexus.ie) for upload base URLs
in the public blog API. Images stored as relative /uploads/... paths
are correctly prefixed with the PHP API server domain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Pause/resume flow for segments instead of Liquidsoap fallback

Spotify harbor is a continuous stream with no track boundaries.
New flow: detect track change → pause Spotify → push segment →
wait for exact mp3 duration (ffprobe) → resume Spotify.

Segments queue as "pending" during generation, drain on track change.

commit.message:
Fix missing deck names in tournament finals bracket (#985)

## Summary
- The finals match in the horizontal tournament bracket was missing deck
names (e.g. "Elves + Elves", "Angels + Doctor") while all other rounds
displayed them correctly.
- The finals template was rendering a bare `bracket-player-name` span
instead of wrapping it in `bracket-player-info` with a `bracket-deck`
span like every other round does.
- Added the same `bracket-player-info` wrapper and `deckNameForSeed()`
call to both player slots in the finals section.

## Test plan
- [x] `make check` passes (lint, typecheck, tests)
- [x] Verified in browser that finals now shows deck names ("Elves +
Elves" and "Angels + Doctor")
- [x] Confirmed other bracket rounds still render correctly

commit.message:
fix: code_sense AST timeout — walk tree.body not ast.walk(tree)

ast.walk() traverses EVERY node in the entire AST tree, timing out
on large files (>500 lines). tree.body gives top-level definitions
only — O(body) instead of O(all_nodes). Fixes 30s timeout in
test_state_reflects_conversation_growth.

commit.message:
fix: patch polymarket_price in window observations when real data arrives

The ML dataset had polymarket_price=0.5 (neutral default) in 100% of
352 training samples because the orderbook tracker is empty on the first
tick of each window (async race condition with CLOB feed).

Fix: after or_insert_with() registers the pending window, if
features.polymarket_price is Some (real data arrived) and the stored
value is still 0.5, patch it immediately. This uses the earliest
available real token price for ML training instead of the neutral default.

Impact: polymarket_price goes from correlation=0.0 (constant) to a
real signal — market consensus is the strongest predictor of binary
market outcomes and was completely missing from the training data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update project tagline to emphasize type safety

"Width safety" undersold the library — we enforce signedness and sort
correctness too.  "Overflow-proof" described the mechanism, not the
value; "explicit overflow" highlights that overflow is a deliberate
decision.  Drop "template library" in favor of "For C++20 and above"
to keep C++ visible without leading with it.
